title: Regicide
author: Dakota Krout
description: Dakota Krout presents the second book in The Completionist Chronicles series...

title: The Bridge Kingdom
author: Danielle L. Jensen
description: Lara has only one thought for her husband on their wedding day: I will bring your kingdom to its knees. A princess trained from childhood to be a lethal spy, Lara knows that the Bridge Kingdom represents both legendary evil - and legendary promise....

title: Dungeon Lord
series: The Wraith's Haunt: A LitRPG Series
author: Hugo Huesca
description: When Edward is swept into the world of Ivalis as a Dungeon Lord, the Dark's most powerful servant, he has no servitude in mind. He'll oppose the evil plans of the Dark god, Murmur, whatever it takes....

title: Level Up or Die!
author: Apollos Thorne
description: Elorion has just finished a VR gaming session to find a monster waiting for him. With 19 other students who have also been kidnapped, he is now subject to the whims of a thousand year old succubus, and he must survive deep under the Earth in the lost realm of the Underworld....

title: Dante's Immortality: Beginnings
author: Antonio Terzini
description: For those who reside in the outer regions of Aleria, the day of bestowal is what determines their destiny. It is the holy day of the Goddess. The day that allows those of age to step forward and receive their blessing, to embark on the path that she has chosen for them....

title: Cultivating Chaos
author: William D. Arand
description: Ash led a very normal life by his own standards. Right up until he was literally pulled into a portal that spat him out into another world. One that was full of martial arts. And martial artists who could use magic....

title: Cities in Chains
author: Tao Wong
description: It's been more than a year since the System came to Earth, bringing blood and monsters in equal measure. Faced with new challenges and new enemies, John steps up once more to set things right and teach a few aliens why you never put humanity in chains....

title: Dodge Tank
author: Rick Scott
description: Ryan's life sucks. His brother is a jerk, his mom is sick, and his legs are next to useless thanks to a neurological disorder. Plus the world ended two centuries ago from nuclear war. Now the only escape from reality being the massive VR world of Crystal Shards Online....

title: Thinking in Systems
author: Donella H. Meadows
description: Thinking in Systems is a concise and crucial book offering insight for problem-solving on scales ranging from the personal to the global. This essential primer brings systems thinking out of the realm of computers and equations and into the tangible world....

title: Shard Warrior
author: Rick Scott
description: Ryan must keep his promise to Val Helena, and he sets out on a dangerous quest to the Vale of Sorrows to defeat the Shadow King. With an enemy 10 times stronger than a world boss, Ryan will have to do some serious leveling up as a Dodge Tank to be fit for task....

title: Culturize
author: Jimmy Casas, Salome Thomas-EL - Foreword
description: Average schools don't inspire greatness - and greatness is what our world needs if we are going to produce world-changing learners. In Culturize, author and education leader Jimmy Casas shares insights into what it takes to cultivate a community of learners....

title: Conquest
author: Antony W. F. Chow
description: When 31-year-old Markos Turloch is murdered in a heinous manner by his boss, Bobbi Nox, as revenge for whistle-blowing on his employer, he loses his humanity and is reincarnated as a diamond-like dungeon core in another world....

title: The Airship: A Futuristic Dungeon Core
author: Skyler Grant
description: Emma is back! The core has been transferred to an airship crashed deep on the Rim. There, Emma and Anna will encounter feuding factions, terrifying monstrosities, and new powered foes....

title: Warden
author: Alex Knight
description: Imprisoned for a murder he didn't commit, Kaiden's only hope of early release is in serving as a Warden in the game-world of Nova Online....

title: The District: A Futuristic Dungeon Core
author: Skyler Grant
description: Emma has gained control of one district of a city run by a woman that she tried to kill. While her new position has improved her upgrade abilities the other district heads have had theirs enhanced as well....

title: The Province: A Futuristic Dungeon Core
author: Skyler Grant
description: Emma has attained new heights in the Scholarium, and while that provides countless new opportunities for research, it also means things have never been more perilous. Alliances will be forged and broken when a new war with the Righteous ignites....

title: The Nation: A Futuristic Dungeon Core
author: Skyler Grant
description: Emma awoke in a broken Earth, but now rules over much of one restored. The restoration of the planet has left old nations broken and scattered and allowed those hungry for power to rise up. New advances will offer Emma all-new ways to abuse her power....

title: The Planet: A Futuristic Dungeon Core
author: Skyler Grant
description: Emma and Anna may have defeated the last foe to their Empire on Earth, but at a terrible price. The planet's atmosphere has largely burned off, and the remaining ecosystems are on the verge of total collapse....

title: The System: A Futuristic Dungeon Core
author: Skyler Grant
description: The solar system has fallen, and the galaxy awaits. The Sol system has now gained admission to galactic society, a junior member held in little esteem, with obligations mounting. Emma and Anna seek to hold their society together as they come into new conflict with the Scythe....

title: Stratus Online: Awakening
author: Drew Cordell
description: Edwin Morris has been playing Sakarn Online almost his whole life. In fact, most people have. While he considers himself a skilled player, he never could really find the time to take his game to the next level and pay the bills....

title: VA Disability Claim Approved!
author: Rick Blair
description: The purpose of this audiobook is to educate you on what is needed and how to properly prepare the nexus letter of your veterans benefits claim so you can level the playing field and win your VA disability benefits claim....
